## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem you're trying to solve. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## Example Usage

```yaml
# Show how the feature would be used in configuration
```

Or for CLI:
```bash
# Show how the feature would be used via command line
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have considered how this feature fits with Qualyx's design philosophy
